name: Semantic Scholar MCP Server
what_it_does: Semantic Scholar MCP server enabling AI agents to search and retrieve academic papers via the Semantic Scholar API — finding research papers by topic or author, accessing citation graphs, retrieving paper abstracts and metadata, and integrating AI2's comprehensive academic knowledge graph into agent-driven research workflows.
use_cases: Searching for academic papers on research topics from literature review agents
Finding citation relationships and influential papers from research agents
Retrieving paper abstracts and metadata from knowledge synthesis agents
Discovering researchers and their publication history from academic networking agents
Building research literature databases from RAG pipeline agents
Identifying trending research topics from trend analysis agents
not_for: Full paper text access (Semantic Scholar provides metadata; some papers have PDFs)
Non-academic web search (use Brave or Google search MCPs)
best_when: An agent needs to search academic literature — Semantic Scholar has comprehensive coverage of CS, biomedical, and STEM research with free API access.
avoid_when: You need social science, humanities, or legal research — use more specialized academic databases.

auth.notes: Semantic Scholar API key optional but recommended for higher rate limits. Free API key available from semanticscholar.org. Works without key at lower rate limits.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free without API key: 1 req/second; with free API key: 100 req/second
pricing.notes: Semantic Scholar API is completely free from Allen Institute for AI. MCP is free community project. Generous rate limits with free API key.

known_agent_gotchas: Built with FastMCP framework — verify FastMCP version compatibility
Paper coverage strong for CS/AI/biomedical; weaker for humanities
Some papers link to PDFs but many are metadata-only
Community MCP wrapper — Semantic Scholar API is well-documented
Citation counts may not be real-time — updated periodically
Author disambiguation is imperfect for common names
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. Free API key is low-risk. Community MCP using FastMCP. No sensitive data handled.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS. Free API key. Community MCP. Academic data only.
